response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling, aligning well with cloud and GenAI requirements. However, his direct experience with production-grade AI solutions and RAG architectures is limited, and his career gap may require clarification.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Python-adjacent languages (DLang/Node.js), and cloud-ready tooling (Docker, AWS CDK).
Proven leadership in technical discovery (workshops, mentoring) and cross-stack development, including AI-agent frameworks at re:cinq.
Strong open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective) and hands-on experience with data pipelines and event-driven architectures.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of production-grade AI/ML experience; most roles focus on full-stack or data integration.
No direct mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization in resume highlights.
Recent career gap (6 months) and limited detail on Staff-level impact at re:cinq.
